notes: No real client, matter, document, billing, settlement, credential, or secret data was used.

CP00-031 is a metadata-only tenant boundary precheck pack: it accepts only RP00.P02.M07.S02-normalized Test And Golden Case Set requests, denies actor tenant mismatches with blocked claim refs, and rejects tenant bypass, cross-tenant allow, test execution, golden fixture generation or persistence, runtime route, service execution, database/storage/product-state write, real-data/secret, catalog mutation, unit-test-contract mutation, source completion, and unknown claims.
A preliminary RP00 validation run before evidence creation failed only because docs/closeout-packs/cp00-031 evidence files did not exist yet.
The completed read-only Claude run is the single valid pack-level review for CP00-031; raw verdict was approve, raw findings were P0=0/P1=0/P2=0/P3=3, and all P3 items are adjudicated non-blocking.

evidence_summary.implementation: RP00.P02.M07.S03 tenant boundary result fields, policy, prechecker, validators, fixture mirror, README entry, contract ledger row, and RP00 validator coverage were added.
evidence_summary.tests: Control-plane service tests include policy binding, same-tenant allow receipt, actor tenant mismatch denial, unsafe claim fail-closed coverage, prechecker no-write handoff, wrong normalized request rejection, and fixture mirror checks.
evidence_summary.hermes_evidence: H00 command ids rp00_control_plane_contract_validate and spec_requirement_validate are represented in the final command evidence.
evidence_summary.claude_review_dependency: C00 actual claude-opus-4-8 max read-only review required before production_ready
evidence_summary.human_approval_boundary: Human approval remains outside this metadata-only S03 tenant boundary pack; the explicit next goal boundary is RP00.P02.M07.S04 Matter trace precheck.

preliminary_expected_failures.summary: Pre-evidence RP00 validation failed only because docs/closeout-packs/cp00-031 evidence files did not exist yet.

commands.command: claude --no-session-persistence -p --model claude-opus-4-8 --effort max --permission-mode bypassPermissions --system-prompt "read-only pack-level code reviewer" --output-format text --max-budget-usd 5
commands.summary: Single valid pack-level read-only review completed; raw verdict approve, raw findings P0=0/P1=0/P2=0/P3=3, unresolved after adjudication P0=0/P1=0/P2=0.
